title: Riftmorph
description: A small morph mod / library for turning into entities
body:
# Riftmorph
Riftmorph is a mod / library for turning into mobs. It currently only handles rendering and collisions, with features like health and attribute changes being planned.

# Usage
Use the /morph command to transform into a living entity of choice. To turn back into a player use /unmorph.
